subcodes.title: Letter to Mulla Javad Baraghani: Risala fi'l-Rububiyyah
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the Lord of all worlds, and peace be upon His sincere servants. O thou who asketh! I have indeed heard all that thou didst write unto me in thy letter. Hearken, then, unto that which I cast unto thee by God's leave, and be thou first just in accordance with thy Lord's command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله رب العالمین و السلام علی عباد الله المخلصین فیا ایها السائل قد سمعت کل ما کتبت الی فی کتابک فاستمع لما ذا القی الیک باذن الله ثم انصف اولاً بحکم ربک
subcodes.subjects: @dissimulation [taqiyyih]; concealment or denial of Faith, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @free will and predestination; fate, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
